rollover_states.condition: reviewed season coverage remains current and source age is within threshold
known season start is within 45 days or the seasonal source exceeds its review threshold
rollover_states.operator_action: review official fixture source and prepare bounded candidate data

rollover_states.condition: the current 30-day public window is empty for an otherwise active seasonal system
rollover_states.operator_action: confirm whether the system is out of season, delayed, or missing reviewed data

rollover_states.condition: the reviewed official route is unavailable, materially changed, or no longer authoritative
rollover_states.operator_action: apply source-breakage escalation and recorded fallback

source_breakage_levels.condition: official route responds but expected reviewed fields or navigation changed
source_breakage_levels.public_action: retain last reviewed projection only when fallback permits; show freshness and official-source warning

source_breakage_levels.condition: official timetable route is unavailable or incomplete but an authoritative fallback remains
source_breakage_levels.public_action: downgrade or link-only according to Calendar Readiness fallback

source_breakage_levels.condition: no reviewed authoritative source remains or source identity cannot be confirmed
source_breakage_levels.public_action: hide from current Calendar and keep candidate/promotion disabled
